name: mtgi-skills
description: Internal Claude Cowork plugin marketplace for MTGI workflows — RFQ normalization, sourcing, and other trading-floor data tools.

plugins.name: rfq-normalizer
plugins.description: Normalize vendor RFQ spreadsheets into MTGI's canonical historical-import template. Enriches missing fields via BrokerBin and Brave web search; surfaces vendor-internal SKU swaps for operator confirmation.
